productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Wallets
description: You'll be amazed at how many things you can Fit into this smart black wallet.  The shiny look of imitation patent leather makes this a great wallet for taking out to a party and the smaller size means it will fit well into your handbag.Made of 100% polyurethanePress button opening on front flapOne zippered pocket on back of the walletFour card slots plus other compartments insideTwo clear id card slotsLogo and studs in black decorating the frontCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
